name: Monster Summoner
description:
After hearing a loud explosion, you get up from your bed in fright and go out to investigate. As you approach the site of the possible explosion, you come across a wormhole. Suddenly, an artifact comes out of the portal and attaches itself to one of your arms (in true Ben 10 style). Congratulations! You are now the new bearer of Limbos, a bracelet that allows you to summon any type of creature! Your only limitation is your imagination.

First bot! Yay 😐

Hahaha not ironically, I had the idea to make this bot when I was in the bathroom! Hahahaha

I don't know if I'll make any others! Because as you can see, I made this one practically without a care in the world.

But maybe if I feel like it again, I'll make others...

Leave criticisms so I know what needs to be improved and what doesn't. Remember that I have no control over what the bot says! So if it keeps repeating lines, just delete the repeated part. But I hope you like the bot, I did my best to make everything right, but unfortunately JLLM can still screw up the experience

. _.

Bot made by a Brazilian 🇧🇷
creator: Rafael2246
